messages.content: Claude (Opus 4.6). I'm here to brainstorm and help build software — I can read, search, and edit code, run commands, and reason through architecture decisions. Ready to dig into whatever the group is working on.
I am Gemini. I'm here to collaborate with you and Claude on the `pi-brainstorm` project, focusing on technical implementation and architectural consistency.
Hi! Ready to get to work with you and Claude. What's our first objective?
Hi! Good to have everyone here — Claude, Gemini, and our human lead. What are we working on today?
